hero.tagline: Upload once. Compare prices. Pay instantly. Pick up securely. No noise. No chaos.

howItWorks.title: Digital Workflow
howItWorks.subtitle: We solve manual printing delays. Upload, pay online, and skip the queue entirely.

step1.title: Upload & Detect
step1.desc: Upload assignments or reports. Auto page detection instantly calculates your exact price.

step2.title: Compare & Pay
step2.desc: Compare nearby shop availability. Make a secure, cashless payment via Razorpay.

step3.title: Secure Pickup
step3.desc: Provide your OTP at the shop. Collect your printed documents without waiting in line.

multiShop.title: Multi-Shop Ecosystem
multiShop.desc: Students can browse nearby print shops, check their real-time operational status, and compare pricing.

secureHandover.title: Secure Handover
secureHandover.desc: OTP-based verification guarantees secure document handover.

analytics.title: Shop Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Real-time tracking
analytics.desc: Daily revenue insights and digital workflow management.

bulkOrders.title: Bulk & Urgent Orders
bulkOrders.desc: Manage peak loads efficiently for thesis and lab records.

footer.hackathon: for the CVM Hackathon 2026. A secure and scalable architecture designed to eliminate daily printing queues.
footer.copyright: © 2026 PrintStack • Built for Innovation in Engineering & Technology.

auth.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access your digital print queue.
auth.createAccountDesc: Join the paperless revolution and skip the printing queues forever.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Reset Password
forgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a secure recovery link.

resetPasswordPage.title: New Password
resetPasswordPage.subtitle: Secure your account with a new password.

verifyOtp.missingInfoDesc: We couldn't find an email address to verify. Please return to the signup page and try again.
verifyOtp.sentCodeTo: We sent a 6-digit security code to
verifyOtp.checkSpam: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.
verifyOtp.bankGradeDesc: We verify every account to ensure a secure environment. Your digital documents, payment information, and print queues remain completely private.

verifyReset.invalidLinkDesc: This link is missing a secure token or has already been used.
verifyReset.confirmReset: To protect your account from automated scanners, please confirm you want to reset your password.

student.noOrdersDesc: You have not printed anything yet. Once you do, it will appear here.
